display.purpose: Hero name on homepage only. Two lines maximum.

title.purpose: Album and section headings on content pages.

label.purpose: Sidebar section headers, listing labels. Smallest mono size in system.

nav.purpose: Nav links, breadcrumbs, button text, chip labels.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy only (homepage bio). Not used in UI.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Color and opacity transitions on nav links, theme toggle, context badges.

motion.name: image-reveal
motion.purpose: Photo and album card hover — opacity reveal + subtle scale.

motion.name: lightbox-fade
motion.purpose: Lightbox open/close via Framer Motion AnimatePresence.

motion.name: theme-switch
motion.purpose: Dark/light theme transition on body and header.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile layout: single-column grid, reduced padding, stacked hero.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Photo page: sidebar collapses below photo pane.

components.name: Tag Chip (Default)
components.description: Filter chip for tags and navigation. Inverts fully on hover; turns Press Red when active.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Azeret Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 4px 12px; background: oklch(0.14 0.006 25); color: oklch(0.48 0.006 25); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-tag:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.006 25); color: oklch(0.10 0.006 25); } .ds-tag:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.48 0.20 25); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Tag Chip (Active)
components.description: Active filter state — Press Red background.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Azeret Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 4px 12px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-tag--active { background: oklch(0.48 0.20 25); color: oklch(0.97 0.006 25); } .ds-tag--active:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.48 0.20 25); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Header navigation. Muted at rest, full text on hover, Press Red when current page.
components.html: LatestSpecialAlbums
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Azeret Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(0.48 0.006 25); transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.95 0.006 25); } .ds-nav-link[aria-current='page'] { color: oklch(0.48 0.20 25); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.48 0.20 25); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Navigation Arrow
components.description: Photo viewer prev/next. Sharp 48px square — inverts to Press Red on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-arrow { width: 48px; height: 48px; background: oklch(0.95 0.006 25); color: oklch(0.10 0.006 25); border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.1rem; font-family: 'Azeret Mono', monospace; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-arrow:hover { background: oklch(0.48 0.20 25); color: oklch(0.97 0.006 25); } .ds-nav-arrow:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.48 0.20 25); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Context Badge
components.description: Sidebar 'Viewing from' link. 5×5px Press Red square dot + album name. Inverts on hover.
components.css: .ds-context-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Azeret Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; background: oklch(0.18 0.006 25); padding: 4px 16px; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(0.95 0.006 25); transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; border-radius: 0; } .ds-context-badge:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.006 25); color: oklch(0.10 0.006 25); } .ds-context-badge:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.48 0.20 25); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-context-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: oklch(0.48 0.20 25); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Label
components.description: Section header within the photo sidebar. Smallest mono size, muted, spaced cap letters.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-section { padding: 32px 24px; } .ds-sidebar-label { display: block; font-family: 'Azeret Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; color: oklch(0.48 0.006 25); margin-bottom: 12px; }

components.name: EXIF Row
components.description: Key-value pair for camera data. Key muted, value bold. No borders between rows.
components.html:
CameraFujifilm X-T4
ISO3200
Aperturef/5.6
components.css: .ds-exif-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-exif-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 16px; } .ds-exif-key { font-family: 'Azeret Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.66rem; color: oklch(0.48 0.006 25); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-exif-val { font-family: 'Azeret Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(0.95 0.006 25); text-align: right; }

narrative.overview:
This is a photography gallery where the interface earns nothing. Every pixel either serves the photograph or disappears. The design references the experience of standing in front of a print in a dark gallery at night — the kind of space where ambient conversation stops, ambient light is absent, and the image is simply there. The architecture of the shell is sharp, quiet, and load-bearing without calling attention to itself.

The system is built on three colors and three fonts, both held to strict discipline. Red appears at most once per visible screen and marks a single state — never ambient, never decorative. The dark surface is not "developer aesthetic" or "night mode as feature"; it is the correct value for photographs to breathe at their own luminance, without the eye adjusting to a competing white field. Borders define structure where a lighter system would use cards, shadows, or rounded containers. There are none.
keyCharacteristics: Three colors: near-black, near-white, press-red — no casual grays
Dark mode primary; light mode structurally identical, only luminance changes
Monospace for all metadata, labels, navigation — Figtree only for body copy
Photographs at partial opacity at rest (55–72%), full on interaction
Flat elevation: depth via tonal layering, never shadows

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Press Red is used for one active or hover state per screen. Its rarity is not a constraint — it is the point. A screen with three red elements is a screen that has lost control of its hierarchy.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every surface and text color is tinted toward hue 25 (warm ochre) at chroma 0.006–0.008. Pure grey oklch(L 0 0) is prohibited. The warmth is imperceptible at a glance but prevents the cold, clinical feeling of pure neutral photography portfolios.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No shadows appear in response to hover, elevation, or state. If depth is needed, use a tonal step, not a drop-shadow.

rules.name: The Mono-First Rule
rules.body: Figtree is used for one purpose: paragraph body copy. Everything else — navigation, labels, tags, dates, EXIF, counts, footer — is Azeret Mono. Figtree in a nav link or a chip is a mistake.

rules.name: The EXIF Rule
rules.body: Metadata is annotation, not feature. Size 0.66rem, weight split: key muted, value bold. It sits quietly until examined.

dos: Keep Press Red to one use per screen
Use border-radius: 0 everywhere — the global reset enforces this
Set images to partial opacity at rest (55% album covers, 72% photo cards)
Use Azeret Mono for every metadata context: labels, nav, tags, EXIF, counts, footer, dates
Express depth through tonal steps (Black → Surface → Surface Hi), never shadows
Use clamp() for display and title headings; fixed rem for UI elements
Write oklch(L C H) for all color values with chroma 0.005–0.010 at hue 25 for neutrals
Transition only opacity, transform, and color/background-color — never layout properties
Use ease-out curves: 0.15s ease for state changes, 0.35–0.45s ease-out for image reveals
Apply the same focus ring everywhere: outline: 2px solid var(--red); outline-offset: 4px
donts: Don't add border-radius anywhere — not even 2px on a button
Don't introduce shadows (box-shadow, drop-shadow, filter: drop-shadow)
Don't use border-left or border-right as a colored accent stripe
Don't introduce a fourth color — the three-color discipline is the system's character
Don't use Figtree in navigation, chips, labels, or any UI element
Don't use Space Mono, Inter, or common portfolio-site font defaults
Don't put images at full opacity at rest — the hover reveal is the interaction
Don't use oklch(L 0 0) pure neutrals — every surface must tilt toward hue 25
Don't design with Tumblr softness: no pastel overlays, rounded containers, blush tones, or script fonts
Don't use neon or blue-purple gradients — this system is not a developer portfolio
